data.chapter_title_en: Words of remembrance for morning and evening
data.arabic_text: ((اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ عَلَى نَبَيِّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ)) (عشرَ مرَّاتٍ).
data.english_text: ‘O Allaah, send prayers and peace upon our Prophet Muhammad.’ [ten times]

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: Allaahumma salli wa sallim 'alaa Nabiyyinaa Muhammadin[ten times]
